One skill per PR.

- [ ] One folder under `skills/` with a single `SKILL.md`
- [ ] Frontmatter: `name`, `description` ("This skill should be used when..."), `license: MIT`, version
- [ ] Sections in order: purpose, Required Inputs, Steps, Approval Gate, Output
- [ ] Anything that sends, pays, publishes, or deletes stops at the approval gate
- [ ] Plain language, no credentials, no client data
